Home › Orange County › Lowest Health Scores

Restaurants With the Lowest Health Scores in Orange County

SHARON'S HOMESTYLE COOKIN sits at the bottom of the barrel in Orange County: 5/100 at its most recent inspection, with 9 high-priority, 1 intermediate, and 10 basic violations on the report. It leads this list of 86 kitchens that graded D or F last time the state walked in.

This grade is calculated by us from Florida DBPR public inspection records — Florida does not issue official grades. How we calculate it →

  • F 5 S
    SHARON'S HOMESTYLE COOKIN American ★ 4.6 (922) Orlando · Orange County Healthy Violations: 9 high-priority, 1 intermediate, 10 basic Inspected May 2026
  • F 15 M
    MING'S BISTRO Chinese ★ 4.1 (1114) Orlando · Orange County VegDF +2 more Violations: 5 high-priority, 6 intermediate, 27 basic Inspected Apr 2026
